svg.title: Reflection and transmission at a potential step
svg.desc: Reflection R and transmission T at a potential step versus E/V0. For E below V0 the reflection is total (R=1, T=0). Above the step R falls and T rises but R stays nonzero — a quantum particle with more than enough energy to clear the step is still partly reflected; R+T=1 throughout.

text.tspan: Potential step: reflection persists even for E > V
